title: Sign in
subtitle: Enter your phone number — we'll send a verification code via SMS.
registerSubtitle: Enter your phone number to get started.
codeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from the SMS.
completeProfileSubtitle: Please enter your name and surname.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordNoUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
passwordNoLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z)
passwordNoNumber: Password must contain at least one number (0-9)
passwordNoSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%...)
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
bannerSubtitle: The easiest way to find and book the best hotels, cozy dachas, and peaceful resorts across Uzbekistan in seconds.
